description: Introduced AISMM versioning model, layer lifecycle statuses, migration policy, extension namespace, and five-level conformance framework. Added aismm-versioning-and-conformance.md as a root-level governance document.

migration_steps.action: Add `aismm_version: 2.0.0` to the root README or aismm-manifest.yaml of each repository.
Add a `status` field to each layer specification using one of the canonical lifecycle values.
Declare a conformance level (L1–L5) in the repository README or aismm-manifest.yaml.

notes: This migration is fully additive. Existing v1 documents remain valid. New fields are optional at L1 and L2.
